arts.ttl: 'We have to accept': Manager now admits his £70m captain could leave this summer after Liverpool make move
“He is not interested” – Agent insists player is ignoring Liverpool and Manchester City transfer rumours
arts.sum: Juventus full-back Andrea Cambiaso is not interested in the rumours linking him to Liverpool and Manchester City this summer. That’s according to his agent Giovanni Bia, who has been speaking to Tuttomercatoweb about the 25-year-old and his future plans.
